name: CREATERNA
description_en: A restaurant in Mishuku that captivates both the eyes and taste buds of guests with beautiful and delicious dishes crafted by a talented chef who trained at renowned three-star restaurants

name: Niku Kaiseki Rinzen
description_en: A meat kaiseki restaurant (serves meals in courses) in Yotsuya driven by the desire of a meat enthusiast enchanted by Tajima beef to unlock its full potential

name: Uotoku
description_en: Kyoto cuisine and Edo-style sushi with the style of a long-running spot

name: Yakitori Shinohara
description_en: A yakitori kaiseki experience in Nishiazabu featuring"Kokutei", the rare heritage chicken from Kagoshima

name: Sushi Mizuno
description_en: A new stage of an experienced sushi chef. An Edo-style sushi restaurant tucked away in the residential neighborhood of Shirokane

name: Tanimoto
description_en: Exquisite world gourmet guide award Japanese cuisine crafted by an honest shop owner.

name: AZUR et MASA UEKI
description_en: A perfect collaboration of Napa Valley's fine winery and Japan's skilled chef.

name: Wolfgang's Steakhouse Signature Aoyama
description_en: A steakhouse in Aoyama that exceeds all expectations, with the finest dry aged meat, seafood, and high-quality ingredients

name: Okamoto
description_en: A two-star restaurant run by one of the most skilled chefs in the Japanese cuisine world to offer delicate and refined dishes

name: l'art et la manière
description_en: Attracted by the elegant dining, a grande maison in Ginza

name: Nishi-azabu Kamikura
description_en: Enjoy top class Edo-mae sushi casually, offered by the head chef once worked at famous sushi place at Ginza

name: Ginza Iwa
description_en: A renowned Ginza sushi restaurant where craftsmanship and true seasonality come together.

name: BENOIT
description_en: A bistro in Aoyama, Tokyo that inherited the taste and esprit of a long-established restaurant in Paris

name: Philippe Mille Tokyo
description_en: Enjoy high-quality champagne with beautiful and finely prepared French cuisine

name: Nanzenji Hyotei Hibiya（Tokyo）
description_en: Kyoto cuisine from a 15th-generation veteran chef, right over the counter

name: Wadakura
description_en: A historic restaurant in a 5-star hotel in Marunouchi, Tokyo, where guests can enjoy traditional kaiseki outlooking the Imperial Palace gardens and Wadakura Moat

name: Yoyogi-Uehara Yuu
description_en: A Japanese restaurant making incredible use of "now-or-never" seasonal ingredients paired with the finest Japanese sake "Ouroku".

name: Makiyaki Ginza Onodera
description_en: An innovative one-star restaurant centered on a wood-fired grill, offering fine French cuisine infused with the essence of Japan

name: Aoyama Sushi Kanesaka
description_en: A sushi restaurant opened by the Kanesaka Group, known for offering authentic Edo-style sushi at reasonable prices,  to bring to Kita-Aoyama the skillful culinary delights that tickle the taste buds of sushi lovers

name: ESqUISSE
description_en: An innovative 2-star French restaurant in Ginza that lets you sense the mistral wind of Southern France

name: Fudomae Sushi Iwasawa
description_en: Independent from “Sushisho” group, 3 kinds of rice delicated combining used in this world gourmet guide award restaurant

name: LUNA E GATTO
description_en: An Italian restaurant in Shinsen that offers specialty dishes featuring an ingredient with which the well-trained chef has fallen in love with

name: Miyake Akira
description_en: Capturing the charm of Tajimi City, Gifu Prefecture to the world, Miyake Akira specializes in kaiseki dishes served by the city’s Special Goodwill Ambassador for Japanese Cuisine

name: Kioicho Mitani Bettei
description_en: A new branch of Mitani opened to demonstrate evolutionary cuisine and profound culinary skills

name: Ginza Maru
description_en: An upscale yet casual kappo restaurant offering exquisite Japanese cuisine in the vibrant district of Ginza

name: Kasumitei Matsubara
description_en: An authentic Japanese restaurant in Nishiazabu, filled with the aromas of charcoal grilled seasonal seafood and Japanese wagyu beef

name: Daikanyama Sushi Takeuchi
description_en: Different from the typical style and has a free expression

name: Shigematsu
description_en: In this relaxing space, enjoy the bold flavors of the cuisine, achieved by layering the ingredients

name: Kioicho Fukudaya
description_en: Food, dishes, and atmosphere. A ryotei associated with Rosanjin, and a place where art and culture meet

name: Kobe Beef Charcoal Kiln Steak Ichimiya
description_en: A steak house in Ginza, Tokyo, where you can enjoy the finest, charcoal-grilled Tajima-bloodline Kobe beef, cooked to perfection

name: Sushi Harumi
description_en: A restaurant started by the well-established restaurant, Ginza Koju, where you can enjoy reasonably priced sushi

name: Ginza Adachi Naoto
description_en: A hidden gem of a restaurant that cherishes the spirit of great hospitality

name: Tempura Yamanoue Roppongi
description_en: Inheriting the spirit and tradition of the legendary Tempura Yamanoue,  this restaurant in Tokyo Midtown showcases the traditional flavors of tempura to connoisseurs from around the world

name: Oriental Lounge
description_en: An exciting hotel lounge in Nihombashi offering spectacular views from the 38th floor and a world-famous afternoon tea

name: Sushi Rizaki Aoyama
description_en: High quality within reach: A sushi restaurant in Aoyama that carries on the heritage of Sushi Rizaki and tantalizes the taste buds of a wide range of customers

name: H1
description_en: An original and innovative restaurant in Ebisu by an up-and-coming chef who knows the cutting edge of Europe

name: Sushi Kaminari
description_en: A sushi restaurant in Nihonbashi Ningyocho that offers Edomae sushi and innovative delicacies conjured up by a talented chef trained at a renowned restaurant

name: Salle à manger
description_en: The restaurant you can taste the REAL French from Lyon

name: Sushi Kitamura
description_en: Authentic sushi in Tachikawa.

name: Waki Shun
description_en: A Japanese restaurant in Nihonbashi that showcases the charm of Japan through culinary adventures guided by a talented chef who has honed his skills at Ginza Kojyu and Paris Okuda

name: Dominique Bouchet Tokyo
description_en: A restaurant by the Maestro of Paris, where the essence of French Cuisine is presented

name: Auberge TOKITO
description_en: A Japanese restaurant in Tachikawa where six chefs deliver “in-season ingredients” from all over Japan

name: Yuina
description_en: A masterpiece open kitchen restaurant with the concept of "serve immediately to ensure deliciousness"

name: Wolfgang's Steakhouse Marunouchi
description_en: Enjoy the highest quality U.S. meat, matured for 28 days, and over 1,000 kinds of wine in an iconic building in Marunouchi, Tokyo

name: Sushi Matsumoto
description_en: Enjoy Edomae sushi along with the taste and charm of Kagurazaka

name: Kyoto Hyoki Roppongi
description_en: Brand-name pork shabu shabu in a modern Japanese-style space with private rooms without the hustle and bustle of the city.

name: Higashi Azabu Ichikawa
description_en: Enjoy Japanese cuisine full of seasonal flavors with sake or wine at a Japanese restaurant transformed from a 70-year-old historic house in Higashi Azabu

name: Ginza Sushi Yoshi
description_en: A sushi restaurant opened in Ginza by a chef trained at a renowned sushi restaurant to pass on Japanese cultural traditions

name: Sushi Kakizaki
description_en: A stylish Edomae sushi restaurant in Ningyocho where the chef, with experience gained at a famous restaurant, is very particular about using natural Japanese ingredients

name: La Bonne Table
description_en: New style casual French gastronomy attracting world's attention

name: Esterre
description_en: A temple to French fine dining at the luxurious Palace Hotel Tokyo, founded in partnership with Ducasse Paris, where Japan’s terroir is presented alongside haute cuisine techniques

name: TAIAN
description_en: from the 'Joel Robuchon' group chef ,Orthodox French cuisine which expresses the spirit of "Sen no Rikyu" on a modern chef's table

name: Sushi Tou
description_en: People are connected here, a private salon alike Edo-mae Sushi restaurant

name: Ginza Kojyu
description_en: Taste “the essence of Japan” in Ginza by a chef who is representative of Japan.

name: La BOMBANCE （Tokyo）
description_en: A new Japanese-style restaurant beyond genre.

name: Kiwa
description_en: A tempura specialist in Yoyogi-Uehara, whose owner studied at renowned restaurant Yamanoue

name: Remerciements OKAMOTO
description_en: French cuisine using seasonal Hokkaido ingredients made by a chef who has been trained at many world gourmet guide awarded restaurants.

name: Akasaka Eigetsu
description_en: Heart-warming dishes and hospitality that beautifully reflect the four seasons of Japan on the plates

name: Sushi Kurofune
description_en: An exquisite Edomae sushi restaurant that wows the residential neighborhood of Kiyosumi Shirakawa like the “Black Ships” of Commodore Matthew Perry

name: Tsukiji Steak Gorio
description_en: A beloved charcoal kiln steakhouse branching from one of Japan’s best steakhouses: Aragawa

name: kun
description_en: At a little place in the basement of a building in the residential area around Akasaka station, where celebrities have been known to frequent, you can enjoy the marriage between perfectly matched food and alcohol filled with creativity and ingenuity.

name: Yakitori Shimaya Minami Azabu
description_en: Enjoy rare brands of chicken and ingredients from Mie in a modern Japanese–Western interior that will appeal to adult clientele

name: FERMiNTXO
description_en: Authentic Spanish cuisine made with organic vegetables to enjoy with sherry

name: Élan (Ebisu, Tokyo)
description_en: Elegant French restaurant where the chef worked at "CHEZ MATSUO"

name: TOUR D'ARGENT
description_en: A fine-dining restaurant with over 440 years of history that has stood as a testament to the essence of French cuisine

name: nomad
description_en: Authentic Italian cuisine restaurant with authentic pasta and meat dishes.

name: Nidaime Kayamori
description_en: A creative restaurant in Higashi Kitazawa that offers an extensive, attractive menu featuring high-quality Wagyu beef selected by a chef with a thorough knowledge of meat

name: Wagyu Yakiniku KIM
description_en: Wagyu Yakiniku KIM suggests "the best way to enjoy Yakiniku" and offers the finest rank of domestic Black Beef.

name: Sushi　Kokoro（Kagurazaka）
description_en: Edo-style sushi provide by the chef who has 17-year experience at Ginza's "Kyubey"

name: Aoyama Jin
description_en: Taste Japanese cuisine while enjoying the garden that shows Japan's four seasons

name: Shu Xiang-Xiang
description_en: Innovative Sichuan cuisine matches up your taste

name: K’shiki
description_en: An elegant Italian restaurant at the five-star Mandarin Oriental Tokyo, offering refined cuisine from a well-traveled chef and panoramic views of Tokyo, the Hakone mountains, and Mount Fuji

name: Shinjuku Sushi Iwase
description_en: Experience authentic Edo sushi which draws inspiration from a famous sushi restaurant, Sushisho.

name: Hachiyama
description_en: Yakiniku Hachiyama, Shibuya, serves the highest quality Japanese beef yakiniku so you can enjoy the original taste of beef.

name: Sumibi Yakiniku Fuchioka
description_en: Independent from famous Grill house, a Charcoal Grill which inherent the highest level of professionalism

name: Sushi Shinsuke（Azabujyuban）
description_en: Delicious, delightful Edo-sushi brought to you by an owner with honed language and customer service skills.

name: Chiso Fufu
description_en: Forgetting the hustle and bustle of Shinjuku, please enjoy the Japanese cuisine using seasonal ingredients.

name: Jinbocho Gokita
description_en: Discover a fusion of yakitori and French cuisine at a celebrated French chef’s restaurant located a four-minute walk from Jinbocho Subway Station.

name: Noyashichi
description_en: New Chinese cuisine incorporating Japanese cooking techniques

name: Sushiya
description_en: Limited 8 seats for sushi at the hideaway of Ginza

name: Kawada
description_en: An authentic counter-style kappo restaurant in Ningyocho

name: Ginza Sushi KANESAKA
description_en: Enjoy sublime cuisine in a serene setting at this renowned one-star sushi restaurant that leads Ginza’s culinary scene

name: Onda Tokyo
description_en: Fusing Italian techniques and Shizuokan ingredients to create new and wonderous flavors

name: au deco
description_en: A one-star restaurant opened in Hiroo by a chef that offers vintage wines and traditional French cuisine

name: Tenoshima
description_en: A tale of a couple trained in a ryotei (traditional Japanese restaurant), who communicate the charm of Setouchi from Aoyama

name: Akasaka Ninomae
description_en: Enjoy tailor-made Japanese hospitality and Matsuba Crab, Echizen Crab, and Japanese cuisine in a serene house in Akasaka

name: Kanda Ilusa
description_en: A Tokyo Kappo reimagined with a refined sensibility—where the best of tradition and innovation come together.

name: Kappou ODAJIMA
description_en: Legendary restaurant that brought Japanese cuisine and wine together

name: Kagurazaka MARUTOMI
description_en: A hidden, 1-star Japanese restaurant that uses Iwate beef and seasonal ingredients

name: "Kaiseki" Fuji
description_en: Expressing traditional Japanese hospitality through Tea Kaiseki and Sushi

name: Azabujuban Ozaki
description_en: A sushi kappo restaurant where guests can enjoy a sublime kappo meal finishing with sushi in a spacious private room

name: M_Mugen
description_en: Celebrate the triumphant return of a top-ranked chef from Shanghai. Enjoy his dynamic yet subtle dishes at his new Chinese restaurant in Ginza.

name: Kaiseki Komuro
description_en: A world gourmet guide award Japanese restaurant in delivers authentic tea ceremony-style kaiseki cuisine

name: BISTECCHERIA INTORNO
description_en: Modern Steak house in Ginza, combined with classical Italian cuisine

name: Ginza Shimoji
description_en: Cooking skills and styles have been honed over many years in this long-established, traditional Japanese restaurant

name: Sukiyaki Kappo Hiyama
description_en: A sukiyaki kappo restaurant featuring only the highest-quality Kuroge Wagyu beef from a revered butcher’s shop in Ningyocho

name: Les Copains de Dominique Bouchet
description_en: Take a moment to relax with a glass of authentic and reasonable French wine.
